response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering credentials and directly relevant geospatial experience as founder of GISCollective and work with Green Map, plus distributed/high-throughput systems exposure at Sociomantic. However, the role's primary requirement is modern C++ or Rust, and the resume shows only a brief ~6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, with no Rust experience. Recent work is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. Worth a screening call to probe C++ depth and willingness to ramp on a systems-language stack, but not a strong technical match on paper.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map work
Distributed, low-latency systems background at Sociomantic handling millions of req/s
Senior-level breadth across stack with strong testing/TDD discipline
concerns: Minimal and outdated C++ experience (~6 months, ~2014-2015); no Rust
Recent stack is web-oriented (TypeScript/Node, React, MongoDB), not systems-level
